studyName: NHLBI GO-ESP: Heart Cohorts Exome Sequencing Project (MESA)

tables.description: The subject phenotype data table includes sociodemography (n=2 variables; self-reported race and sex), medical history (n=4 variables; gout, asthma, epmphysema, and family history of stroke), baseline observations (n=18 variables; age, MI, Framingham CHD probability, bmi, T2 diabetes, anthropometric measures, stroke, menopause status, hormone replacement, and atrial fibrillation status), follow-up observations (n=5 variables; MI and stroke status), EKG measures (n=13 variables), lung function measures (n=3 variables), blood pressure measures (n=4 variables), heart measures (n=9 variables; CAC Agatston scores IMT values, angioplasty, CABG, and PAD status), lipid and cholesterol measures (n=5 variables), urine measures (n=4 variables), blood coagulation factors (n=6 variables), glucose measures (n=2 variables), serum proteins (n=8 variables; cystatin C, creatinine, CRP, and ICAM), smoking status (n=2 variables), and ESP cohort, phenotype, study site, sequence center, and target capture used in sequencing.

variables.name: ESP_ABI_resids_from_CARe
variables.description: Residuals for ankle brachial index (ABI), calculated in CARe

variables.name: ESP_Cohort
variables.description: Cohort name

variables.name: ESP_afib_baseline
variables.description: Atrial fibrillation at baseline (0/1)

variables.name: ESP_age_at_ABI
variables.description: Age in years at ABI measurement

variables.name: ESP_age_at_cac
variables.description: Age in years at CAC Agatston score measurement

variables.name: ESP_age_at_crp
variables.description: Age in years at CRP measurement

variables.name: ESP_age_at_ekg
variables.description: Age in years at EKG measurement

variables.name: ESP_age_at_factorviii
variables.description: Age in years at Factor VIII measurement

variables.name: ESP_age_at_fibrinogen
variables.description: Age in years at Fibrinogen measurement

variables.name: ESP_age_at_icam1
variables.description: Age in years at ICAM1 measurement

variables.name: ESP_age_at_imt
variables.description: Age in years at IMT measurement

variables.name: ESP_age_at_menopause
variables.description: AGE IN YEARS AT MENOPAUSE

variables.name: ESP_age_at_serum_creatinine
variables.description: Age at serum creatinine measurement

variables.name: ESP_age_at_serum_cystatinc
variables.description: Age in years at serum cystatin c measurement

variables.name: ESP_age_at_urinary_albumin
variables.description: Age in years at urinary albumin measurement

variables.name: ESP_age_at_urinary_creatinine
variables.description: Age in years at urinary creatinine measurement

variables.name: ESP_age_at_vwf
variables.description: Age in years at visit of hemostatic factors measurement

variables.name: ESP_age_baseline
variables.description: Age in years at baseline

variables.name: ESP_angioplasty_baseline
variables.description: BASELINE ANGIOPLASTY STATUS (0/1)

variables.name: ESP_asthma_ever
variables.description: Asthma ever diagnosed (0/1), assessed at baseline visit (only for HeartGO and WHISP)

variables.name: ESP_avblock2_at_ekg
variables.description: SECOND DEGREE AV BLOCK

variables.name: ESP_avblock3_at_ekg
variables.description: THIRD DEGREE AV BLOCK

variables.name: ESP_beta_blockers_ekg
variables.description: Betablockers, for EKG group.

variables.name: ESP_bmi_baseline
variables.description: Baseline BMI in kg/m2

variables.name: ESP_cabg_baseline
variables.description: BASELINE CABG STATUS (0/1)

variables.name: ESP_cac_agatston_score
variables.description: Coronary artery calcium Agatston total score

variables.name: ESP_crp
variables.description: C-reactive protein level in mg/L at designated visit (may not be baseline)

variables.name: ESP_current_smoker_baseline
variables.description: Current smoking status at baseline (0/1)

variables.name: ESP_dbp_baseline
variables.description: Diastolic blood pressure at baseline (avg. of 2 measurements), in mm Hg

variables.name: ESP_digoxin_ekg
variables.description: Digoxin, for EKG group

variables.name: ESP_dihydro_calc_chan_block
variables.description: Dihydropyridine calcium channel blockers

variables.name: ESP_ekg_hr
variables.description: HR interval from EKG at designated visit (may not be baseline)

variables.name: ESP_ekg_pr
variables.description: PR interval from EKG at designated visit (may not be baseline)

variables.name: ESP_ekg_qrs
variables.description: QRS interval from EKG at designated visit (may not be baseline)

variables.name: ESP_ekg_qt
variables.description: QT interval from EKG at designated visit (may not be baseline)

variables.name: ESP_emphysema_ever
variables.description: Emphysema ever diagnosed (0/1), assessed at baseline visit (only for HeartGO and WHISP)

variables.name: ESP_factorviii
variables.description: Factor VIII level in % at designated visit (may not be baseline)

variables.name: ESP_fastglucose_baseline
variables.description: Blood fasting insulin at baseline in uU/mL.  (Note that there are some extreme outliers)

variables.name: ESP_fastinsulin_baseline
variables.description: Blood fasting glucose at baseline in mg/dL

variables.name: ESP_fev1_first_avail_visit
variables.description: FEV1 measurement at the first available visit (only for HeartGO)

variables.name: ESP_fibrinogen
variables.description: Fibrinogen level in mg/dL at first designated visit (may not be baseline)

variables.name: ESP_former_smoker_baseline
variables.description: Former smoking status at baseline (0/1)

variables.name: ESP_frs_chdprob_baseline
variables.description: Framingham Risk Score predicted prob. calculated at baseline (was not calculated for those with baseline history of MI)

variables.name: ESP_fvc_first_avail_visit
variables.description: FVC measurement at the first available visit (only for HeartGO)

variables.name: ESP_gout
variables.description: May be MD-reported, self-reported, or abstracted from patients taking allopurinol.  Ever had gout through study.

variables.name: ESP_hdl_baseline
variables.description: HDL level in mg/dL at baseline

variables.name: ESP_height_baseline
variables.description: Standing height in cm at baseline

variables.name: ESP_hormone_replacement_baseline
variables.description: Indicator (0/1) for current use of hormone replacement therapy

variables.name: ESP_htn_med_baseline
variables.description: Hypertension med status (any) at baseline (0/1)

variables.name: ESP_htn_status_baseline
variables.description: Physician diagnosed hypertension status at baseline (0/1)

variables.name: ESP_icam1
variables.description: ICAM1 level in ng/mL at designated visit (may not be baseline)

variables.name: ESP_imt_anyplaque
variables.description: Presence of any plaque, as determined by IMT at designated visit (may not be baseline).

variables.name: ESP_imt_meanmean_farwall_cca
variables.description: Average far wall thickness of the right and left common carotid mean IMT values, using as many views as are available for a given study

variables.name: ESP_imt_meanmean_farwall_ica
variables.description: Average far wall thickness of the right and left internal carotid maximum IMT values, using as many views as are available for a given study

variables.name: ESP_inc_stroke_subtype
variables.description: Incident stroke subtype.  Subtype is available only on a subset of samples, so will be missing for some with non-missing age at incident stroke

variables.name: ESP_ldl_baseline
variables.description: Baseline calculated LDL in mg/dL (missing where trigs>400)

variables.name: ESP_lipid_med_baseline
variables.description: Any lipid lowering med (statin or other) at baseline

variables.name: ESP_lung_function_visit
variables.description: The visit that lung function measurements were taken

variables.name: ESP_menopause_status_baseline
variables.description: BASELINE MENOPAUSE STATUS

variables.name: ESP_mi_baseline
variables.description: MI status at baseline (0/1)

variables.name: ESP_mi_during_followup
variables.description: 0/1 to indicate that an MI occurred during study follow up.  0 if no MI during study follow up.  1 if an adjudicated MI occurred during study follow up (even if baseline MI status was 1).

variables.name: ESP_mi_tte_or_censor
variables.description: Time to event variable for MI.  Time (in days) from start of study to MI for event that occurred during study follow up; and follow up time for those that did not have an MI during study follow up.

variables.name: ESP_nondihydro_calc_chan_block
variables.description: Non-dihydropyridine calcium channel blockers, for EKG group.

variables.name: ESP_pacer_ekg
variables.description: PACER AT EKG

variables.name: ESP_pad
variables.description: BASELINE PERIPHERAL ARTERY DISEASE STATUS (0/1)

variables.name: ESP_phenotype
variables.description: ESP Phenotype group (phenotype that the sample was selected to be sequenced for)

variables.name: ESP_race_selfreport
variables.description: Self report race

variables.name: ESP_sbp_baseline
variables.description: Systolic blood pressure at baseline (avg. of 2 measurements), in mm Hg

variables.name: ESP_serum_creatinine
variables.description: Serum creatinine in mg/dL

variables.name: ESP_serum_cystatinc
variables.description: Raw cystatin C (mg/L)

variables.name: ESP_sex_selfreport
variables.description: Values: Male; Female

variables.name: ESP_stroke_baseline
variables.description: Stroke status at baseline (0/1)

variables.name: ESP_stroke_during_followup
variables.description: 0/1 to indicate that a stroke occurred during study follow up.  0 if no stroke during study follow up.  1 if an adjudicated stroke occurred during study follow up (even if baseline stroke status was 1).

variables.name: ESP_stroke_famhx_baseline
variables.description: Family history (first degree relatives) of stroke at baseline (0/1)

variables.name: ESP_stroke_tte_or_censor
variables.description: Time to event variable for stroke.  Time (in days) from start of study to stroke for event that occurred during study follow up; and follow up time for those that did not have an stroke during study follow up.

variables.name: ESP_study_site_or_subcohort
variables.description: Clinic or field center within cohort

variables.name: ESP_surgical_menopause
variables.description: Indicator (0/1) for surgically induced menopause

variables.name: ESP_t2d_med_baseline
variables.description: Baseline Type 2 diabetes medication status (0/1)

variables.name: ESP_t2diabetes_baseline
variables.description: Diabetes status at baseline (0/1)

variables.name: ESP_totchol_baseline
variables.description: Total cholesterol at baseline in mg/dL

variables.name: ESP_trigs_baseline
variables.description: Triglycerides at baseline in mg/dL

variables.name: ESP_urinary_albumin
variables.description: Raw urinary albumin.  Note: these are in original study units and not harmonized across studies)

variables.name: ESP_urinary_creatinine
variables.description: Raw urinary creatinine in mg/dL

variables.name: ESP_vwf
variables.description: VWF level in % at designated visit (may not be baseline)

variables.name: ESP_waist_baseline
variables.description: Waist in cm at baseline

variables.name: ESP_weight_baseline
variables.description: Weight in kg at baseline

variables.name: ESP_whr_baseline
variables.description: Waist to hip ratio at baseline

variables.name: ESP_wpw_at_ekg
variables.description: WOLFF-PARKINSON-WHITE PATTERN

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: Sequence_center
variables.description: Indicates where the sample was sequence at

variables.name: Target
variables.description: Indicates target capture used in sequencing

tables.description: The sample attributes data table includes MESA ESP HeartGO sample IDs, sample analyte type (DNA), body site (blood) where samples were collected, and tumor status, ESP vcf IDs, ESP phenotypes.

variables.name: Analyte_type
variables.description: Type of analyte

variables.name: Body_site
variables.description: Body site or tissue that sample is from

variables.name: ESP6800vcf_id
variables.description: Sample ID for the ESP6800 vcf file

variables.name: ESP_phenotype
variables.description: ESP Phenotype group (phenotype that the sample was selected to be sequenced for)

variables.name: Is_tumor
variables.description: Indicator of whether sample from tumor

variables.name: SAMPID
variables.description: Sample ID (for individual vcf files from sequencing sites)
